channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Celebrate America's 250th and the World Cup 2026 With a New Hisense TV Under $1,000 Right Now at Best Buy - IGN
item.description:
1. Celebrate America's 250th and the World Cup 2026 With a New Hisense TV Under $1,000 Right Now at Best Buy  IGN
  2. Is this the best TV you can buy for under $1,000?  Yahoo Tech
  3. Best Buy slashed the price of this gorgeous art TV by up to 57%  USA Today
  4. I review TVs year-round, and these are the best Prime Day TV deals on the sale's final day  Business Insider
  5. The Recently Launched, Feature-Rich TCL QM7L 4K SQD Mini-LED TV Is on Sale for Prime Day  Popular Mechanics

item.title: Everything We Know About World Of Warcraft's Rumored Classic+ - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Everything We Know About World Of Warcraft's Rumored Classic+  Kotaku
  2. A Once-Dismissed Warcraft Leak May Have Just Revealed Blizzard's Huge Plans For The Franchise  GameSpot
  3. As Blizzard continues its private server takedown spree, dataminers may have uncovered what's next for World of Warcraft: Classic  Eurogamer
  4. WoW dataminer reveals new store purchases for an upcoming WoW launch, which could be Classic+  The Escapist
  5. World of Warcraft Camelot discovery gives the MMO's community its most compelling evidence yet that Blizzar...  Yahoo Tech
